title: Nine MCP tools exceed the 12-requirement spec
evidence: src/server.rs:29-143 defines search_matches, get_team_stats, head_to_head, get_standings, search_players, get_player, analyze_stats, best_records, list_competitions — more tools than strictly required
suggestion: No action needed; additional tools improve usability

title: Comprehensive cross-dataset deduplication for Serie A 2012-2019
evidence: src/queries.rs:30-44 dedup() deduplicates by (date, home, away) across 3 overlapping source files with priority ordering
suggestion: No action needed; robust data-quality feature

title: Extensive team name normalization with alias table and accent handling
evidence: src/normalize.rs:77-105 alias() covers 20+ variants; canonical_team() handles state suffixes, parentheticals, accents, and ambiguous clubs
suggestion: No action needed; strong normalization layer

title: BDD test suite with 38 tests covering all capabilities and 20 sample questions
evidence: tests/bdd_mcp_protocol.rs:162-203 scenario_twenty_sample_questions_are_answerable exercises all 20 TASK.md sample questions end-to-end through the MCP protocol
suggestion: No action needed; exemplary test coverage
